items.0: Keep this page open — the status updates automatically.
items.1: Do not close the verification tab until you see the confirmation.
items.2: If it takes longer, click “Refresh” or “Continue now.”
items.3: If issues persist, contact support with a screenshot of the confirmation.

complete.redirect: You’ll be redirected automatically once verification is confirmed.
complete.subtitle: We’re waiting for confirmation from our provider.
